name: Clarity of Heart
description: Spring Spirit Summoning can be used 1 more time.

name: Centered Spirit
description: Divine Maiden's Deliverance lasts for 6 seconds longer. Active characters within the skill's field deal 15% increased Cryo CRIT DMG.

name: Seclusion
description:
Increases the Level of Spring Spirit Summoning by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.

name: Insight
description:
When characters under the effect of Icy Quill applied by Shenhe trigger its DMG Bonus effects, Shenhe will gain a Skyfrost Mantra stack:
· When Shenhe uses Spring Spirit Summoning, she will consume all stacks of Skyfrost Mantra, increasing the DMG of that Spring Spirit Summoning by 5% for each stack consumed.
· Max 50 stacks. Stacks last for 60s.

name: Divine Attainment
description:
Increases the Level of Divine Maiden's Deliverance by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.

name: Mystical Abandon
description: When characters trigger Icy Quill's effects using Normal and Charged Attack DMG, it does not count toward the Trigger Quota.
